But I notice something interesting: there's a charcoal at [[0, 63]] as well! This is a 1x1 charcoal pixel at the top-right corner. This is probably part of the HUD bar.
So the game is still active. The charcoal is at cols 10-13, which is the starting position.
Now I need to figure out how to complete the level. I've tried all positions and clicking on various elements, and the level doesn't complete.

But wait, maybe the goal in Level 2 is different. Maybe the goal is to move the charcoal to a specific position and then click on something specific.
